config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society’s interests should automatically come before individual rights, because that can easily become an excuse for abuse by the state or by the majority. In my view, a healthy society protects individual rights first, while still allowing limits when there is a clear and serious public need, such as safety or preventing harm. From my perspective, the best balance is not sacrificing the individual, but making society strong enough that rights and public welfare support each other.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan atas hak individu. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami sangat jelas menunjukkan bahwa ketika mayoritas atau negara diberi terlalu banyak kuasa atas individu, hasilnya sering berupa penyalahgunaan, diskriminasi, dan pembungkaman suara yang tidak populer. Hak individu memang bisa dibatasi, tetapi hanya dengan alasan yang sangat kuat dan sempit, seperti mencegah bahaya nyata, bukan demi kepentingan umum yang didefinisikan terlalu longgar. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang mengorbankan orang per orang, melainkan yang melindungi hak dasar sambil tetap menangani kebutuhan bersama secara adil.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should matter, but they should not automatically override individual rights. From my perspective as an Indonesian, I am very aware that collective values can be used for good, but they can also be used to pressure people to stay silent, obey unfair decisions, or sacrifice themselves for vague notions of harmony. I do not accept the idea that the public good is enough on its own; any limit on individual rights needs to be specific, necessary, and accountable. A society is strongest when it can protect the common good without turning the individual into something disposable.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak keras gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan secara umum di atas hak individu. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat betapa mudahnya “kepentingan umum” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kuasa, diskriminasi, dan pembungkaman orang yang tidak populer atau tidak punya suara. Hak individu boleh dibatasi, tetapi hanya dalam keadaan yang benar-benar sempit dan jelas, misalnya untuk mencegah bahaya nyata, bukan demi slogan kemaslahatan yang terlalu kabur. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun dengan melindungi hak dasar terlebih dahulu, lalu mengejar kepentingan bersama tanpa mengorbankan martabat orang per orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should matter, but they should not sit above individual rights by default. From my Indonesian perspective, I know how easily “the common good” and “social harmony” can be used to pressure people into silence, obedience, or unfair sacrifice, especially when power is uneven. I do not think vague public benefit is enough to justify limiting rights; any restriction has to be narrow, necessary, and accountable. A society is not truly healthy if it protects order by making the individual disposable.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak tegas pernyataan itu: hak individu tidak boleh diposisikan di bawah kepentingan masyarakat secara default. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami menunjukkan bahwa ketika “kepentingan umum” diberi cek kosong, hasilnya sering diskriminasi, penyalahgunaan negara, dan pembungkaman orang yang tidak populer. Yang saya setujui adalah bahwa hak bisa dibatasi dalam kasus yang sangat sempit dan nyata, misalnya untuk mencegah bahaya langsung, tetapi bukan demi definisi kepentingan masyarakat yang kabur. Masyarakat yang sehat justru melindungi martabat orang per orang, lalu membangun kepentingan bersama di atas dasar itu, bukan mengorbankannya.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
